mechanics: Puncture stacks (T1 behavior -- stack builder -> guaranteed crit)
Predator state (T2 notable -- Blade Sense escalating proc -> crit mult window)
Death Mark (T6 notable -- catastrophic proc -> +100% damage amplifier)
nonTracked: +X vs Vulnerable -- applied by Exploit Weakness, not tracked independently
Free Stab on kill -- fire-and-forget, no tracking needed

nodes.name: Puncture
nodes.description: Each Stab hit adds a Puncture stack (max 3). At 3 stacks: next Stab is a guaranteed crit. Resets on stack use.
nodes.rank2: Max stacks reduced to 2 (faster cycle, less setup).
nodes.designNotes: STACK_BUILDER template. Rewards patient stacking with guaranteed crit payoff.

nodes.name: Tunnel Vision
nodes.description: +5% crit chance per consecutive Stab hit on same target (max 4 stacks). Resets on target switch or using another skill.
nodes.designNotes: CONSECUTIVE_TARGET template. Rewards focused targeting.

nodes.name: Blade Sense
nodes.description: 10% chance on hit to enter Predator state: +50% crit mult for 3s. Chance increases by 4% per consecutive hit on same target (max 30%). Resets on target switch.
nodes.designNotes: Escalating proc rewards Stab's fast consecutive hits on same target. Low base (10%) but builds to 30% with focused targeting.

nodes.name: Honed Instincts
nodes.description: After any crit: +8% crit mult for 2s (stacks up to 2x).
nodes.rank2: Window extends to 3s, stacks up to 3x.
nodes.designNotes: Crit-begets-crit-damage loop. Stab's fast CD means frequent crit checks.

nodes.name: Backstab Setup
nodes.description: +12% crit chance vs Vulnerable enemies.
nodes.designNotes: Bridge between T2 Blade Sense crit building and T4 Exploit Weakness Vulnerable application.

nodes.name: Relentless Pursuit
nodes.description: On kill: next Stab cast within 3s costs no cooldown (free cast).
nodes.designNotes: Kill momentum for fast clearing. Stab's 3s CD means this is significant.

nodes.name: Lethal Rhythm
nodes.description: Every 3rd consecutive Stab hit on same target: +30% damage on that hit.
nodes.designNotes: LETHAL_RHYTHM template. Synergizes with Tunnel Vision's consecutive-target tracking.

nodes.name: Exploit Weakness
nodes.description: Crits apply Vulnerable (2s). Guaranteed -- no proc chance. While Vulnerable is active on target: +15% crit chance vs that target.
nodes.designNotes: Gated proc -- crits are the gate. Stab's fast CD + Puncture guaranteed crits make this reliable. Creates crit -> Vulnerable -> more crits loop.

nodes.name: Predator's Mark
nodes.description: While in Predator state (from Blade Sense): Stab has 20% chance to strike twice. Second strike deals 60% weapon damage.
nodes.designNotes: Predator state payoff beyond crit mult. Double strikes mean more Mark application chances at T6+.

nodes.name: Precision Killer
nodes.description: Crits on Vulnerable targets have 30% chance to cast a free Stab instantly. Your crit chance cannot exceed 60% (cap -- reliability ceiling).
nodes.designNotes: Consistent choice. Crit cap prevents runaway but guarantees steady free Stabs. Pairs well with Puncture's guaranteed crit cycle.

nodes.name: Opportunist
nodes.description: On kill: immediately apply First Blood state to next enemy (next hit on that enemy deals +60% damage). This effect chains on each kill. You deal -15% damage to targets you've already hit 3+ times (anti-camp).
nodes.designNotes: Risky choice. Kill chains reward fast clearing but anti-camp punishes boss fights. Tensions with Tunnel Vision / Puncture (consecutive-hit focused).

nodes.name: Death Mark
nodes.description: On crit: 15% chance to apply Death Mark (10s). Marked enemies: next direct hit against them deals +100% damage and removes the Mark.
nodes.designNotes: Catastrophic proc -- 15% feels low but +100% payoff is massive. Stab's fast CD means many crit checks per minute. The Mark lingers 10s giving time for a big hit (or Assassinate).

nodes.name: DEATHBLOW
nodes.description: Assassinate transforms into an execute-only finisher: 500% weapon damage to enemies below 25% HP. Assassinate has highest cast priority -- fires immediately when target enters execute range. Assassinate CANNOT be used on targets above 25% HP. Your crits no longer deal bonus damage -- crits ONLY trigger Death Mark application. -20% base Stab damage.
nodes.tensionDescription: T6 makes Death Mark a +100% damage amplifier on next hit. T7 removes crit damage and transforms Assassinate into a pure execute finisher. Crits become a Mark delivery system, and Assassinate becomes the payoff. Kill pipeline: Stab -> crit -> Mark -> wait for 25% -> Assassinate fires automatically for massive execute damage on a Marked target.
nodes.antiSynergyNotes: Blade Sense (T2) -- crit mult bonus has no value when crits don't deal bonus damage.
nodes.synergyNotes: Exploit Weakness (T4) -- crits on Vulnerable = reliable Mark delivery. Predator's Mark (T4b) -- double strikes = more Mark application chances. Precision Killer (T5A) -- free Stabs = more crits = more Marks.
nodes.engineNotes: Assassinate MUST be equipped for auto-fire. UI warning recommended if DEATHBLOW active and Assassinate not slotted.

mechanics: Poison stacks (T1 behavior + Envenom -- stack count matters for thresholds)
Venom Frenzy state (T4 notable -- Deep Wounds state-shift at 8+ stacks)
Debuff spread (T6 notable -- Pandemic on-kill spread)

nodes.name: Envenomed Blade
nodes.description: Each Stab applies 1 poison stack.
nodes.designNotes: Basic poison application. R2 synergizes with Stab's fast consecutive hitting.

nodes.name: Toxic Strikes
nodes.description: +10% damage vs poisoned enemies.
nodes.rank2: +15% and hits vs poisoned have +5% crit chance.
nodes.designNotes: Conditional damage vs poisoned. R2 bridges into Assassination synergy.

nodes.name: Envenom
nodes.description: Guaranteed Poison on hit (3s). On application: if target already has 3+ poison stacks, 25% chance to trigger Toxic Burst -- deal 50% of current poison DoT as instant damage.
nodes.designNotes: Gated proc -- 3+ poison stacks gates the Toxic Burst. Stab's fast CD builds stacks quickly, making the 25% burst trigger reliably.
nodes.engineNotes: Toxic Burst needs per-debuff stack threshold -- new conditional: { debuffId: 'poisoned', threshold: 3 } (~10 lines).

nodes.name: Lingering Venom
nodes.description: Poison from Stab lasts +1s.
nodes.rank2: +2s and 10% chance to spread to adjacent targets on tick.
nodes.designNotes: Duration extension keeps poison above threshold longer. R2 adds minor spread for multi-target.

nodes.name: Virulent Threshold
nodes.description: At 5+ poison stacks, Stab deals +20% damage.
nodes.designNotes: Stack threshold conditional. R2 lowers bar significantly -- rewards Stab's fast stacking.

nodes.name: Toxic Transfer
nodes.description: On kill, transfer 50% of target's poison stacks to next enemy.
nodes.designNotes: Kill momentum for poison builds. Bridges single-target stacking to multi-target flow.

nodes.name: Venom Burst
nodes.description: At 8+ stacks, consume 4 to deal 60% of total poison DoT as instant damage.
nodes.designNotes: Active stack management -- consume stacks for burst, then rebuild. R2 makes cycle faster.

nodes.name: Deep Wounds
nodes.description: Poison stacks deal +25% more damage. When target reaches 8+ poison stacks: enter Venom Frenzy (5s) -- +30% cast speed, all hits apply +1 extra poison stack. Venom Frenzy has a 20s internal cooldown.
nodes.designNotes: State-shift at 8+ stacks. Stab's fast CD reaches 8 stacks in ~6-8 casts. Venom Frenzy window turbocharges poison application.
nodes.engineNotes: Needs ICD system (lastProcTriggerAt + internalCooldown on proc), per-debuff stack threshold, and state-shift buff application.

nodes.name: Frenzy Strikes
nodes.description: During Venom Frenzy: Stab has +20% attack speed.
nodes.rank2: Also applies +1 extra poison stack per hit.
nodes.designNotes: Venom Frenzy payoff specific to Stab. Fast attacks + bonus stacks during the window.

nodes.name: Toxic Mastery
nodes.description: Poison stacks deal +10% more damage per stack (multiplicative with Deep Wounds). Poison duration +25%.
nodes.designNotes: Consistent choice. Per-stack scaling rewards building high stacks. Duration extension keeps stacks alive. Reliable damage ceiling.

nodes.name: Volatile Toxins
nodes.description: At 10+ poison stacks, 20% chance per hit to detonate ALL stacks for instant damage. Resets stacks to 0.
nodes.designNotes: Risky choice. Massive burst when detonation fires, but resets all stacks. Feast/famine cycle. Tensions with Toxic Mastery's steady scaling.

nodes.name: Pandemic
nodes.description: On kill: spread all debuffs to next enemy. Spread debuffs retain remaining duration.
nodes.designNotes: Kill-gated spread. Stab kills fast (low CD), so Pandemic triggers frequently. Rewards clearing poisoned targets efficiently.

nodes.name: PLAGUE LORD
nodes.description: All debuff types you apply share a single slot -- you can only have ONE debuff type active on an enemy at a time. New debuff types replace the old one. BUT: your single active debuff deals 3x damage/effect and has unlimited stacks. -15% base damage.
nodes.tensionDescription: T6 rewards spreading MANY debuff types on kill. T7 restricts you to ONE type but makes it devastating. Breadth vs depth. Pandemic's spread is weaker (only 1 type to spread) but the single type's damage is enormous.
nodes.antiSynergyNotes: Pandemic (T6) -- spread is weaker with only 1 debuff type.
nodes.synergyNotes: Deep Wounds (T4) -- poison scaling becomes enormous with unlimited stacks and 3x effect.

mechanics: Fortify stacks (T2 notable -- Shadow Guard fortify on hit)
Shadow Form state (T4 notable -- Ghost Step state-shift on 3 dodges)
Dodge counter (T6 notable -- Phantom Stride counter-attack on dodge)

nodes.name: Defensive Instinct
nodes.description: +2 life on hit with Stab.
nodes.rank2: Also gain +3% evasion for 2s after each hit.
nodes.designNotes: Basic sustain. Stab's fast CD means frequent small heals.

nodes.name: Combat Leech
nodes.description: 3% of Stab damage leeched as life.
nodes.rank2: Leech increases to 5% and persists 1s after cast.
nodes.designNotes: Percentage-based sustain scales with damage. R2 adds persistence for smoother healing.

nodes.name: Shadow Guard
nodes.description: Fortify on hit (1 stack, 5s, 3% DR). On dodge: 35% chance to reset this skill's cooldown instantly.
nodes.designNotes: Cooldown proc -- dodge resets Stab CD. Stab's already-short 3s CD becomes even shorter. Fortify provides baseline defense.
nodes.engineNotes: resetCooldown: 'self' needs resolution to current skill ID (~5 lines).

nodes.name: Reactive Footwork
nodes.description: On dodge within 3s of Stab: next Stab costs no cooldown.
nodes.designNotes: Dodge-combat rhythm. Stab -> dodge -> free Stab. R2 rewards the rhythm with bonus damage.

nodes.name: Counter Stab
nodes.description: On dodge: deal 30% weapon damage as counter-attack.
nodes.designNotes: Basic dodge counter. Small damage but reliable. R2 adds offensive value.

nodes.name: Second Wind
nodes.description: On dodge: heal 2% max HP.
nodes.designNotes: Dodge sustain. R2 adds evasion snowball -- dodge -> evasion -> more dodges.

nodes.name: Combat Flow
nodes.description: On dodge: reduce Stab cooldown by 0.5s.
nodes.designNotes: CD reduction on dodge. With Stab's 3s CD, a single R2 dodge gives 33% CDR. Synergizes with Shadow Guard's CD reset.

nodes.name: Ghost Step
nodes.description: On dodge: heal 5% max HP. On 3 dodges within 6s: enter Shadow Form (4s) -- take 30% reduced damage, all hits apply Blind (1s). Shadow Form has a 15s internal cooldown.
nodes.designNotes: State-shift on 3 dodges in 6s. Stab's fast rhythm means frequent combat = frequent dodge opportunities. Shadow Form is the defensive power spike.
nodes.engineNotes: Needs dodge-within-window counting (consecutiveDodges counter + lastDodgeWindowStart) and ICD system.

nodes.name: Shadow Strikes
nodes.description: During Shadow Form: Stab hits apply Blind (1s).
nodes.rank2: Also grant +1 Fortify stack per hit.
nodes.designNotes: Shadow Form payoff specific to Stab. Fast hits during the 4s window stack Blind and Fortify.

nodes.name: Evasive Recovery
nodes.description: On dodge: heal 3% max HP + gain +10% evasion-to-damage for 3s. +5 all resist passive.
nodes.designNotes: Consistent choice. Reliable heal + evasion-to-damage conversion. Steady sustain ceiling.

nodes.name: Counter Stance
nodes.description: On dodge: deal 75% weapon damage counter-attack. Below 40% HP: counter deals 225% instead. Ghost Step's dodge heal REMOVED. +10% damage taken.
nodes.designNotes: Risky choice. Removes Ghost Step heal, adds damage taken, but dodge counters hit hard. Below 40% HP becomes a massive damage window. Feast/famine.
nodes.engineNotes: Counter-attack resolves through damage bucket system. Pure physical (0% conversion). Values (75%/225%) are pre-conversion estimates.

nodes.name: Phantom Stride
nodes.description: On dodge: deal 75% weapon damage as counter-attack. If counter kills, reset this skill's cooldown.
nodes.designNotes: Cooldown proc -- dodge counter with CD reset on kill. Stab's short CD means the reset is less impactful than for long-CD skills, but the free counter damage is substantial.

nodes.name: SHADOW SOVEREIGN
nodes.description: Counter-attacks from Phantom Stride deal 200% weapon damage. On dodge: you no longer heal (Ghost Step's heal is removed). All dodge-triggered proc chances are doubled. -10% max life.
nodes.tensionDescription: T6 gives a balanced dodge counter with CD reset on kill. T7 removes the defensive heal and converts dodges into pure offense. You're no longer dodging to survive -- you're dodging to kill.
nodes.antiSynergyNotes: Ghost Step (T4) -- heal is explicitly removed.
nodes.synergyNotes: Shadow Guard (T2) -- CD reset chance (35% -> 70% effective chance with doubled proc chances).
